bead.title: runs cross-links + e2e: bead↔run, run↔artifact, runs.spec.ts
bead.description:
Wire up cross-navigation links and write the runs.spec.ts e2e test.

Cross-links:
- Bead detail: linked run records (layer=try or run) with status, click → runs detail
- Run detail (work/try): beadId links to bead detail (/beads/:beadId)
- Run detail (run layer): if artifactId present, shows 'Produced artifact: <title>' link to /artifacts/:artifactId
- Artifact detail: if producing run exists, 'View producing run' link is live (navigates to run detail)
- Combined /nodes/:nodeId/runs: row links navigate to correct project-scoped /runs/:runId (carrying projectId from row data)

E2E (runs.spec.ts):
Full US-086b + US-094b workflow:
1. Navigate to project runs
2. Apply layer=work filter → verify URL + filtered list
3. Click work record → verify work detail fields
4. Click child try → verify try fields (bead link, revisions, worktreePath, mergeOutcome)
5. Click child run → verify run fields (power, harness, tokens, cost, evidence)
6. Follow evidence link → verify artifact link present
7. Navigate breadcrumbs back up: run → try → work → list
8. Verify filter state restored after navigating back

Depends on ddx-a9c6ad1c (runs detail), ddx-43684ac1 (artifact provenance for backlink).
bead.acceptance:
1. Bead detail shows linked run records; clicking navigates to run detail.
2. Run try/work detail: beadId links navigate to bead detail; Back returns to run detail.
3. Run-layer detail: artifact link present when artifactId set; link is live.
4. Artifact detail: 'View producing run' link is live and navigates to run detail.
5. Combined runs list: row click carries correct projectId in URL.
6. runs.spec.ts passes: complete work→try→run drill-down, breadcrumb back-navigation, artifact link.
